english_query: Also, to talk is to turn a thought in the mind toward someone else, as was shown before. But a spirit from god always turns his thought to god. So if a spirit from god talks to god, he always talks to god; which seems not right in some ways, because a spirit from god sometimes talks to another spirit from god. So it seems a spirit from god never talks to god.
ugf_response: Spirits from god are always talking to god in the way of saying good things about him and his work; but they talk to him by asking him what should be done at any time they have to do any new work, about which they want to know more.

english_query: I would want nothing more than that.
ugf_response: Do not he and you and the well known person who knows a lot say that there are certain things that go out of what is?

english_query: It looks like these days are not counted right. For the work of making things is just as different from the work of sorting and dressing them up as those two works are from each other. But we give different days for sorting and dressing up, so we should give a different day for making things.
ugf_response: The great old church teacher says the work of making things is about making stuff without shape and spirit without shape, which are outside of time, as he says. So the making of either is put before any day. But we can also say, like other writers who write for god, that sorting and dressing up mean changes in things that we can tell by time; but making things is only the god act that brings things into being all at once. For this reason, we say every work of sorting and dressing up happens in a day, but making things happens in the beginning, which means something that cannot be cut into parts.

english_query: Also, body things are not ready to be known, but are known by seeing and imagining, which the good spirits do not have. So the good spirits do not know body things.
ugf_response: If a good spirit got his knowing of body things from the body things themselves, he would need to make them ready to be known by taking away their body parts. But he does not get his knowing of them from the body things themselves; he knows body things by clear marks of things that fit him well; just as our mind knows by marks it makes clear by taking away body parts.

english_query: It looks like light is a body. Because the great old church teacher said that light is the first among bodies. So light is a body.
ugf_response: The great old church teacher meant light to be a thing that gives out bright light and is doing its work; in other words, he meant it to be fire, the best of the four parts that make up the world.

english_query: Also, we can know if the big one is there as said before; but we cannot know what he is. So the being there of the big one is not the same as what he really is.
ugf_response: The word 'is' can mean two things. It can mean the act of what something really is, or it can mean the mind joining what we say about something to the thing itself. If we take 'is' in the first way, we cannot get the being there of the big one nor what he really is; but only in the second way. We know that the thought we make about the big one when we say 'the big one is' is true; and we know this from what he does.

english_query: Also, a special thing is what belongs to one alone. Since there are more than one in God who come from another, there is nothing to stop several from not coming from another. So the Father is not the only one who does not come from another.
ugf_response: In every kind of thing there must be something first; so in what God is, there must be one start which is not from another, and we call this not coming from another. To say there are two such starts is to say there are two Gods and two ways of being God. So an old teacher of the church says: As there is one God, so there cannot be two who do not come from another. And this is especially true because, if there were two who do not come from another, one would not be from the other, and they would not be different by how they stand to each other: so they would be different by having different ways of being.

english_query: Also, god does nothing unless he wants it. But wanting something to happen is not the same as wanting it to be good. So doing things should not be part of wanting them to happen.
ugf_response: Just as we can say in a way that is not right that god wants things he does not really want; so we can say in a way that is not right that god wants what he does, even if he really wants it. So nothing stops the same thing from being what he wants to be good and what he wants to happen. But doing is always the same as wanting it to be good; while telling others what to do or giving ideas are not; this is because doing is about now, while telling and giving ideas are about later; and also because doing is the thing that comes from wanting, while telling and giving ideas are things that come through others.

english_query: Also, the lower things get to god through the higher ones, as a man who knew much says. But since all the sky helpers are not the same, there is only one sky helper with no one between him and men. So there is only one sky helper who watches men right away.
ugf_response: As said before, all the sky helpers of the first group get light from god in some ways; but in other ways, only the higher ones get light from god right away, and they show it to the lower ones. This is also true for the lower groups: for a lower sky helper gets light from one of the highest in some ways, and in other ways from the one just above him. So it is possible that one sky helper lights up a man right away, and yet has other sky helpers below him whom he lights up.

english_query: Also, the man part of the God-man is full of good gifts and true words, and has the spirit in full size; so he cannot be better. Also, the great happy feeling given to people is called the best good, so it cannot be better. And the good mother is put above all groups of sky spirits, so she cannot be better than she is. So god cannot make all things better than he has made them.
ugf_response: The man part of the God-man, because it is joined to god; and the great happy feeling, because it is the full having of god; and the good mother, because she is the mother of god; all have a certain never-ending good use from the never-ending good, which is god. And for this reason there cannot be anything better than these; just as there cannot be anything better than god.

english_query: It looks like god wants bad things. Because god wants every good thing that is. But it is a good thing that bad things are. For the great old church teacher said: 'Even though a bad thing is not good, it is good that not only good things are, but bad things too.' So god wants bad things.
ugf_response: Some said that even if god does not want bad things, he wants bad things to happen, because it is good that bad things happen. They said this because bad things lead to some good end; and they thought this was what they meant. But this is not right. Bad things do not lead to good by what they really are, but by chance. For when a person does wrong, they do not plan for good to come from it; just as hard leaders did not plan for strong people to show their power through their pain. So we cannot say that bad things leading to good is part of the idea that it is good for bad things to happen, because we see things by what they really are, not by what happens by chance.

english_query: It looks like the bad spirits have the light of truth. For the light of truth is showing what is true. But one bad spirit can show truth to another, because the higher ones know more by how they are made. So the higher bad spirits can give this light to the lower ones.
ugf_response: Not every time truth is shown is it this light, but only the kind that was said before.

english_query: Also, only a part of the soul that can do things is a place for bad acts. But the voice in the head is a place for bad acts; for it is said of some that their mind and voice in the head are made bad. So it looks like the voice in the head is a part of the soul that can do things.
ugf_response: The voice in the head is called bad, not as a place that gets bad, but like the thing seen is in the seeing; in that a person knows he is bad.

english_query: Also, the old teacher of many says that the picture in the mind is to the thinking part what color is to seeing. But seeing does not happen by taking the idea of color out of the color, but by the color making its mark on the eye. So thinking does not happen by taking something out of the picture in the mind, but by the picture making its mark on the thinking part.
ugf_response: Colors, being in real body things, are like the power of seeing: so they can make their mark on the eye. But pictures in the mind, since they are marks of single things and live in body parts, are not like the human thinking part, so they cannot make their mark on the waiting thinking part by themselves. This is done by the power of the working thinking part which turns to the picture and makes a certain mark in the waiting thinking part that shows, only in its main way, the thing seen in the picture. This is how we say the idea is taken out of the picture; not that the same mark that was in the picture is then in the waiting thinking part, like a thing moved from one place to another.

english_query: There you must let me off: the great man from long ago said no to it; and is maybe the first who tried to say such a big and strange thing; at least, the first who made it a big part of his way of thinking.
ugf_response: And by being the first might he not have seen his wrong? For is this a thing where men who think hard can hope to find new things, especially in this late time? And can any man hope to win by just saying no (for this thing hardly lets for thinking hard), against what all men say, built on what they see and feel? And why should man, he added, think he is free from the lot of all other animals? The whole earth, believe me, church man, is bad and not clean. A never-ending fight is started among all living things. Need, empty stomach, not having enough, push the strong and not afraid: Fear, worry, big fear, shake the small and sick. The first step into life brings pain to the new baby and its sad parent: Small power, no power, trouble, follow each part of that life: and it ends in pain and fear. Look too, says church man, at the ways that show good thinking of the way things are, to make the life of every living thing not sweet. The strong eat the small, and keep them in never-ending fear and worry. The small too, in their turn, often eat the strong, and bother and hurt them without rest. Think of that huge number of small flying things, which either grow on the body of each animal, or, flying about, put their sharp points in him. These small flying things have others still smaller than themselves, which hurt them. And so on each side, before and behind, above and below, every animal is around with those who want to hurt him, which always look for his pain and end.

english_query: Because I feel sad about my own not being able to think well and my way of talking too much; for what other word will tell about the way of a man who is always talking for and against a question; whose not being able to think well cannot be shown wrong, and who will never stop?
ugf_response: But what makes you feel sad?

english_query: It looks like the fact that things are not all the same does not come from God. Because the best maker makes the best things. But among the best things, none is bigger than another. So God, who is the Best, should make all things the same.
ugf_response: The best maker makes a whole that is best all together; but this does not mean he makes every part the best by itself, but right for the whole. Take the case of a living thing: if every part of it was as good as an eye, the thing would not be good. So God made the whole world best as a group; but he did not make each thing the best, but some better than others. So we read that God saw each thing and it was good. But for all things together, it says God saw them and they were very good.

english_query: That is the end of it.
ugf_response: You see, the hot one, when you look at the two ways of proving things wrong, how different they are. All people, except for me, think like you; but your one yes and word are enough for me. I do not need any other, I take your say so, and do not care about the rest. Enough of this, and now let us go to the next question; which is, if the biggest bad thing for a bad person is to get in trouble, as you thought, or if getting away with it is a bigger bad thing, as I thought. Think about it: You would say that getting in trouble is another way of saying being made right when you do wrong?

english_query: old teacher, you are right.
ugf_response: Then that was the first case of which I spoke.

english_query: But in my way of seeing hot one, the person who does wrong is sad in any case, more sad if he is not made to pay for it and does not get what is right, and less sad if he is made to pay for it and gets what is right from gods and men.
ugf_response: You are holding to a strange way of thinking old teacher.

english_query: Again, then, as before we made a kind of soft yellow shape in the mind, let us now think that in the mind of each person there is a big place for birds of all kinds--some flying together away from the rest, others in small groups, others alone, flying anywhere and everywhere.
ugf_response: Let us think of such a big place for birds--and what comes next?

english_query: And yet, young man, I cannot help thinking that the other was better; and I am sure that you would think the same, if you would only stay and learn the hidden ways, and were not forced, as you said the day before, to go away before the hidden ways.
ugf_response: But I will stay, old teacher, if you will give me many such answers.

english_query: Also, the good of the big maker is why things are here, as the great old church teacher said: 'Because the big maker is good, we are here.' But the big maker cannot stop being good. So he cannot make things stop being here; which would happen if he made anything end.
ugf_response: The good of the big maker makes things be, not because it must happen by how things are made; but by his own free choice. So, just as he could have chosen not to make things be, without this hurting his good, so he could choose not to keep things being, without this hurting his good.

english_query: Also, some jobs belong to the groups of sky helpers, like to watch over, to do great signs, to stop bad spirits, and so on; which do not seem to belong to the souls of good men. So they are not moved into the sky helper groups.
ugf_response: Sky helpers are by how things are made between us and god; and so by the usual way they take care of not only human things, but all body things. But good men even after this life are of the same kind as us; and so by the usual way they do not take care of human things, 'nor do they get into the things of the living,' as the great old church teacher says. Still, by a special giving it is sometimes let to some of the good men to do these jobs; by doing great signs, by stopping bad spirits, or by doing something of that kind, as the great old church teacher says.

english_query: Also, man has the mind power that is like the good spirits, and the sense power that is like the animals. But reason, which is only for man and makes him a thinking thing, is a power different from sense. So it is also true to say it is different from the mind power, which is for the good spirits and makes them mind things.
ugf_response: Other animals are much lower than man so they cannot reach the knowing of what is true, which reason looks for. But man does reach, even if not all the way, the knowing of true things that the good spirits know. So in the good spirits the power of knowing is not a different kind from that in human reason, but is like the full thing to the not full thing.

english_query: Is it not a fact that doing wrong, and doing wrong to others, is the biggest of bad things?
ugf_response: That is quite clear.

english_query: Yes, that also stays the same.
ugf_response: And a good life is the same as a right and good life. Does that also stay good?

english_query: It looks like god is not outside of time. For we should not say things made about god. The old teacher who thought well says the now that moves makes time, but the now that stays still makes being outside of time. The great old church teacher says god is the one who makes being outside of time. So god is not outside of time.
ugf_response: The now that stays still is said to make being outside of time for how we see it. Just as our seeing of time comes from seeing the now move, our seeing of being outside of time comes from seeing the now stay still. When the great old church teacher says god is the one who makes being outside of time, he means the kind of being outside of time that things get from him. For god gives his being outside of time to some things in the same way he gives his not changing.

english_query: Why not give the name yourself, old teacher?
ugf_response: Well, if you want me to, I will; and you will say if you agree with me, and if not, you will show I am wrong and answer me. Well, as I think, is the name which is given to the right order of the body, from which comes being well and every other good thing of the body: is that true or not?

english_query: I see no reason why we should feel bad about our showing, old teacher.
ugf_response: He will say: You mean to talk that the man whom we only think of and do not see, cannot be put together with the horse which we do not see or touch, but only think of and do not know? That I believe to be my meaning, I will say.

english_query: It looks like if there is a reason that can make something happen then something will happen. Because a reason that makes nothing happen is a bad reason and needs something else to make the thing happen. But god is the reason that can make the world happen. He is the last reason because he is good, the main reason because he knows, and the strong reason because he has power as we saw above. Since god is always, the world is also always.
ugf_response: Just like what comes after comes from a reason that works by the way things are in the way they are made, so also what comes after comes from a person who chooses it in the way that person planned and set. As we saw above. So even though god was always the reason that can make the world we should not say the world was made by him except as he chose it to be, that it should be after not be so we can see his hand more clear.

english_query: You are hard to talk with, old teacher.
ugf_response: No, I ask you not to fight, but because I want to know how you think things should be run among us. When you run them, do you have any other end than to make the people better? Have we not said many times that this is the job of a leader? Yes, we have said so. If you will not answer for yourself, I must answer for you. But if this is what a good man should do for his city, let me remind you of the names of the great leaders you just mentioned, like the first leader, and the second leader, and the third leader, and the one after that, and ask if you still think they were good people in the city.

english_query: Also, things that have no stuff have no reason for being, as the old teacher of big thoughts says. But the soul has a reason for being, since God made it. So the soul has stuff.
ugf_response: The shape makes stuff be, and so does the maker; so the maker makes stuff be by changing it to have a shape. But a shape that stands on its own does not need a shape to make it be, nor does it have a maker that changes it from what it could be to what it is. So after the words said above, the old teacher of big thoughts says, that in things made of stuff and shape 'there is no other reason but that which moves from what it could be to what it is; while whatever things have no stuff are just real things right away.'

english_query: Also, no god person is made. But the word of god is something made. For it is said that fire, ice, and storms do his word. So the word is not a name for a person in god.
ugf_response: The word 'word' is used there in a side way, as the thing shown or done by a word is called a word. For this is how made things are said to do the word of god, as they carry out what happens, which they are set to do from the word thought up by the mind of god that is able to think well; just as a person is said to do the word of the one who leads when he does the work he is told to do by the words of the one who leads.

english_query: Also, every thing that works by mind works from a start, as seen in all makers. But god works by mind: so his work has a start. The world, then, which is his making, did not always be here.
ugf_response: This is the way of thinking of an old man who knew much. But it does not show it must be true, except for a mind that thinks hard to find what to do, which is like moving. This is the human mind, but not the mind of god.

english_query: Also, the better a living thing is, the more things it does inside; like a man who can think and want, which other animals cannot. But god is much better than any living thing. So in god there is not only one person coming from wanting, and another from thinking, but in a number that has no end. So there are persons in god that have no end.
ugf_response: Man is better than other animals, so he does more things inside, because his being good is made of many parts. So the spirits that are better and simpler, do fewer things inside than man, for they do not picture things or feel them. In god there is only one real thing done, which is his true being. How there are two ways in him was shown before.

english_query: Also, the dark time comes between the end of the day and the start of the next; while the middle of the day comes between the start and the end. So if the good spirits have a start-of-day knowing and an end-of-day knowing, it looks like they should also have a middle-of-day knowing and a dark-time knowing.
ugf_response: The start-of-day and end-of-day knowing are part of the light time, which is for the good spirits who are far from the dark time, which is for the bad spirits. The good spirits, while they know about things made, do not stick to them, for that would be to turn to the dark time and the night; but they point this back to saying good things about God, in whom, as in their start, they know all things. So after the end-of-day there is no dark time, but a start-of-day; so the start-of-day is the end of the last light time, and the start of the next, as far as the spirits point to saying good things about God their knowing of the last work. The middle-of-day is part of the light time, as the middle between the two ends. Or else the middle can be about their knowing of God himself, who has no start and no end.

english_query: It can not be said that God says yes to any bad thing. But if the mind is made by God, often God says yes to the bad love of a person, since often a child is made from bad love. So the mind is not made by God.
ugf_response: When a person does bad love, the part that is real is good; God says yes to that. But the part that is too much want is bad; God does not say yes to that.

english_query: Very true, old teacher.
ugf_response: Then being good to the gods is a way that the gods and people use to do things with each other?

english_query: Also, knowing one single thing is more clear than knowing the big group. But the soul that is not in the body has no clear knowing of the kinds of things in the world, so much less can it know single things.
ugf_response: The knowing of the soul that is not in the body is held to those kinds or single things that the soul has some clear tie to, as we have said.
